changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: SIGNAL: Iran easing Hormuz restrictions per maritime data — countries cutting individual deals instead of joining US coalition. This is a partial de-escalation on the economic front, though military strikes continue. Europe refuses Hormuz naval deployment. Putin-Trump call today is the key diplomatic variable for Ukraine. Zero ceasefire signals in ME active theaters.

latest_news.headline: Fresh Iran missile barrage at Israel — IDF defense systems intercepting
latest_news.text: IDF reports missiles launched from Iran toward Israel this evening. Defense systems operating to intercept. Precautionary alerts sent to phones in relevant areas. Fresh attack cycle continuing.

latest_news.headline: Iranian missile strikes Ras Laffan LNG facility in Qatar — fire reported
latest_news.text: Qatar MoD: 5 ballistic missiles from Iran, 4 intercepted, 1 hit Ras Laffan Industrial City causing fire. Civil Defense responding. Ras Laffan is one of world's largest LNG facilities. Qatar has all but halted gas exports due to Hormuz blockade.

latest_news.headline: About 90 ships crossing Strait of Hormuz despite war — Iran still exporting millions of barrels
latest_news.text: AP: ~90 ships have crossed Hormuz. Iran continuing to export millions of barrels of oil despite war. Blockade is selective, not total — Iran bans US/Israeli ships but allows others. De-escalation on maritime front.

latest_news.headline: Trump says US will 'end war soon' — but allies refuse Hormuz coalition
latest_news.text: Trump says US will end war soon. Bloomberg: Iran attacks on Israel and Arab states continue despite rhetoric. AP analysis: Trump's failed strong-arming of allies shows pressure losing its effect. Zero European commitments for Hormuz coalition.

latest_news.headline: Trump attends dignified transfer for 6 US service members killed in Iran war
latest_news.text: Trump at Dover AFB for dignified transfer of 6 service members killed last week when US refueling plane crashed in Iraq. Domestic political significance — war casualties becoming visible.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 24, 21:05 UTC) — (1) Fresh Iran missile barrage at Israel tonight — IDF intercepting; (2) Ras Laffan LNG facility in Qatar HIT — 5 missiles, 1 penetrated, fire reported; (3) ~90 ships still crossing Hormuz despite war — Iran exports millions of barrels (selective blockade); (4) Trump says 'end war soon' but allies refuse Hormuz coalition; (5) Trump attends dignified transfer of 6 US troops killed; (6) No ceasefire signals in ME. Military escalation continues on all fronts. Energy war widening.
